text: God Presides in the Divine Assembly

segments.text: God presides in the divine assembly; He renders judgment among the gods:
How long will you judge unjustly[^183] and show partiality to the wicked? Selah
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Defend the cause of the weak and fatherless; uphold the rights of the afflicted and oppressed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Rescue the weak and needy; save them from the hand of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
They do not know or understand; they wander in the darkness; 
all the foundations of the earth are shaken.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I have said, ‘You are gods; you are all sons of the Most High.’[^184]
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But like mortals you will die, and like rulers you will fall.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Arise, O God, judge the earth, for all the nations are Your inheritance.
